system.notes: Onboard auto-pilot/navigation (the Autonav Rating adds dice to standard Driving Tests, but is ignored in vehicle combat). Rating 1 collision-avoidance (the only autonav fittable to a motorcycle), 500¥/5 DP/2/96 hrs/SI 1; Rating 2 route-following on mapped terrain, 4,000¥/10 DP/3/6 days/SI 2; Rating 3 rough-terrain + GPS, 5,000¥/50 DP/4/8 days/SI 3; Rating 4 urban off-road + re-routing, 15,000¥/150 DP/6/14 days/SI 3. Install TN = 8 − Handling. Rigger 2 p.122–123.
